untranslatable_reason: Signal references 'fast and slow momentum lines' and 'swing low/high' without specifying exact indicators. MACD used as best proxy for divergence between momentum lines, but original signal requires custom swing detection logic and ATR-based distance thresholds ([THRESHOLD_NEEDED] parameters) that cannot be fully parameterized without explicit values. Volume confirmation condition also requires custom logic beyond allowed indicators.
translation_notes: Mapped 'fast line' to macd and 'slow line' to macd_signal as closest approximation of momentum divergence. Used pivot points (s1/r1) as proxy for recent swing levels. ATR-based stop losses cannot be expressed in entry conditions with current rule schema. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT per original signal specification. Regime limited to TRENDING variants per target specification.
